---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new source, output, or capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The idea**
What would you like the skill to do?

**The signal it would use**
Which on-disk artifact(s) would this read? (browser, photos, calendar, etc.)

**How it stays private**
This is a local-only, consent-first tool. How would your idea preserve that? (Should it be
opt-in? Does it touch the personal layer?)

**Who it helps / why it matters**

**Anything else**
(See `docs/` for the Handoff Pack and Story Seeds design specs if your idea relates to those.)
